settings.title: Monster Piercing | Reverse Belly Rings
settings.text:
Explore our stunning collection of Reverse Belly Rings, expertly crafted with Silver Charms and Steel Banana Bars for lasting comfort, strength and style. Each piece is designed with high quality materials to provide a secure fit and a beautiful shine that complements any look.

Our Reverse Belly Bars feature elegant silver tops with clear and coloured cubic zirconia stones, including all the main CZ shades inspired by birthstones. From subtle sparkle to vibrant colour, every design adds a touch of personality and luxury to your piercing.

Perfect for both new and healed piercings, these belly rings combine the durability of steel with the elegance of silver, creating jewellery that is both practical and timeless. Our Silver and Steel Reverse Belly Rings offer the ideal mix of beauty, comfort and long lasting brilliance.

settings.question: What are reverse belly rings?
settings.answer:
Reverse belly rings, also known as top-down belly bars, feature the decorative charm or
gemstone positioned at the top of the navel rather than hanging below it. This creates a modern, eye-catching look that sits beautifully on the upper curve of the belly button.

settings.question: What is the difference between reverse and traditional belly rings?
settings.answer:
The main difference lies in where the decoration sits:

  • Traditional belly rings feature the gem or charm below the navel.
  • Reverse belly ringsshowcase the decoration above the navel, creating a stylish, elevated look that’s ideal for cropped clothing or higher-waisted outfits

settings.question: Are your gold and silver reverse belly rings safe for sensitive skin?
settings.answer:
Yes. Our 14K gold reverse belly rings are
hypoallergenic, nickel-free, and suitable for sensitive skin. Sterling silver options are safe for healed piercings but are best avoided in new piercings, as silver can oxidise over time.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale pricing for reverse belly rings?
settings.answer:
Yes. We supply our reverse belly rings to
piercing studios and retailers at competitive wholesale rates. Contact our team for trade pricing and stock availability.
